evidence_quotes: Users will log in exclusively via SSO through the external Portal.
This system will not implement its own login or registration functionality.

decision_title: Prioritize Photo Upload and Output Modeling
evidence_quotes: Two main features to prioritize:1. Photo upload2. Output modeling
The sidebar needs to distinguish between two folder types — 'Album' and 'Project' — managing photos and modeling data separately
The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos
Modeling progress must be shown as a progress bar, displaying the status of each stage (AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation, etc.)
When creating a project, users can select photos from the photo list to import into the project folder
A project folder can designate other users to jointly view the modeling results; Albums are private to the owner only and do not support multi-user access
If an upload is interrupted, upload progress is preserved via a caching mechanism, supporting resume-from-breakpoint
The user's personal page displays used and remaining storage; each user's photo-upload limit can be dynamically adjusted based on system settings and permissions
When AT computation fails, provide a mechanism to adjust parameters and re-run

decision_title: Expert Mode Deferred to Future Version
evidence_quotes: After photo upload, distinguish between 'Normal Mode' (default parameters) and 'Expert Mode' (freely adjustable parameters); V1 will implement Normal Mode only
After photo upload, distinguish between 'Normal Mode' (default parameters) and 'Expert Mode' (freely adjustable parameters)
